scenario: Married filing jointly: installment sale gain at 0% LTCG rate — gain from sale of investment property held over 1 year, recognized pro-rata in year of receipt
source: IRS Pub 17 TY2025, Chapter 8: Other Income (p. 67–68, installment sales); 2025 LTCG rates (0% for MFJ taxable income ≤ $96,700); 2025 Tax Table
